body:
## Summary

Remove the minimal set of trailing whitespace / extra EOF whitespace currently causing downstream `git diff --check` verification failures after syncing `.agent/` and `.github/` from upstream.

## Changes

- Trim trailing whitespace in affected docs and prompt templates.
- Remove one extra blank line at EOF in `.agent/src/reactions.ts`.
- No behavior changes.

## Validation

- `git diff --check`

comments.body:
## Rubrics Review

| Total Score | Verdict | Rubrics Scored |
| -- | -- | -- |
| 100 | PASS | 2 |

| Dimension | Rubric | Result | Score | Evidence |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| coding_workflow / generic | Make surgical changes | pass | 50/50 | PR #37 touches only five files and the diff is limited to trimming trailing whitespace plus one EOF blank line removal in [`.agent/src/reactions.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/badf60170a55c0326f7660331774767281280890/.agent/src/reactions.ts). |
| coding_style / generic | Prefer simple implementations | pass | 50/50 | The implementation is a direct whitespace cleanup with no new code, abstractions, formatting churn, or behavior changes. The PR patch passes `git apply --check --whitespace=error-all`. |

## Notes

- The PR satisfies the applicable rubrics cleanly: it is minimal, targeted, and directly addresses the stated `git diff --check` failure mode.
- Other selected rubrics were not scored because this PR does not change workflow behavior, add docs structure, introduce reusable logic, perform merge operations, or touch stateful runtime failure handling.
- No rubric-specific follow-up needed.

## Findings

- No rubric-specific findings.

## Final Rubric Verdict

PASS

## AI Review Synthesis

<!-- sepo-agent-review-synthesis -->

> Dual-agent review by **Claude** and **Codex**.
> Requested by @lolipopshock.

## Summary of PR/Issue
- PR #37 removes trailing whitespace and one extra EOF blank line from agent docs, prompt templates, and `.agent/src/reactions.ts`.
- The stated goal is to clear downstream `git diff --check` failures after syncing `.agent/` and `.github/` assets from upstream.
- The PR intentionally avoids behavior changes and keeps the patch limited to whitespace cleanup.
- No parent issue or broader plan was referenced in the PR body or visible conversation.

## Review
Both independent reviews found no actionable issues. The PR is surgical, matches the stated cleanup goal, and reviewer validation confirms the changed files no longer contain trailing whitespace problems.

| Issue | Severity | Description |
| -- | -- | -- |
| No actionable issues | INFO | Reviewers found the PR correctly scoped to whitespace cleanup, with no behavioral regressions or required follow-up changes. |

## Progress
- Rubrics review already passed with no rubric-specific findings.
- Codex review reported no findings and verified `git diff --check origin/main...origin/pr/37`.
- Existing PR conversation contains no unresolved objections.
- No inline review comments were posted because there are no concrete changed-line issues to call out.

## Recommended Next Step
`NO_AUTOMATED_ACTION`: no unresolved actionable work remains, so another automated fix pass is unnecessary.

## Final Verdict
SHIP

## Action Items
- [ ] No required branch changes.

## Rubrics Update

No changes were committed to `agent/rubrics` from PR #37.

no rubric changes

PR #37 only contains whitespace cleanup. The conversation had no trusted human review comments or explicit durable preference beyond “keep the change minimal,” which is already covered by existing `surgical-changes` and `simple-implementation` rubrics. The rubrics checkout remains clean.

title: chore: remove trailing whitespace from agent assets
